# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Write secure code.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: your-s3-bucket-name
      region: your-region
      access_key: your-access-key
      secret_key: your-secret-key
      base_path: snapshots
      compress: true
      readonly: false

  creation:
    schedule: "0 0 * * *" # Daily at midnight
    retention:
      max_count: 30
      min_count: 5
      max_age: 30d

  restoration:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false

  security:
    encryption: true
    access_control:
      roles:
        - snapshot_creator
        - snapshot_restorer

  notifications:
    email:
      enabled: true
      recipients:
        - ops-team@example.com
      smtp:
        host: smtp.example.com
        port: 587
        username: your-smtp-username
        password: your-smtp-password
        tls: true
